scenario.title: The Multi-System Orchestrator
scenario.context: Your AI-powered workflow needs to coordinate actions across multiple systems (CRM, email, calendar, project management) in a specific sequence with proper error handling and compensation.
scenario.goal: Write a prompt that orchestrates multi-system integrations with saga pattern for distributed transactions.
scenario.exampleInput: New deal closed: 1) Update CRM deal status, 2) Create onboarding project in Asana, 3) Schedule kickoff meeting in Calendar, 4) Send welcome email. If any fails, compensate previous steps.
hints: Specify compensation action for each step

scoringGuide.excellent: Clear DAG with 3+ systems and dependencies
Full saga with compensation per step
